title: Xpeng Stock Tanked Over 10% As Revenue Forecast Spooks Wall Street
text: Xpeng stock declined sharply after the company provided lower-than-expected guidance for Q4 2025. The company posted a loss of just $0.02 per share, beating Wall Street's expectation for a $0.07 loss. However, XPeng stock fell by more than 10% after the company provided lower-than-expected guidance for Q4. The guidance disappointment overshadowed the earnings beat on the bottom line, highlighting how forward-looking statements can heavily influence investor sentiment.
